arm2.title_ko: 발병 4.5~24시간 후 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에 대한 Tenecteplase: OPTION 무작위 임상시험
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In patients with non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke and salvageable brain tissue on perfusion imaging presenting 4.5 to 24 hours after onset, does intravenous tenecteplase improve 90-day functional outcome compared with standard medical treatment, and at what safety cost?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 관류영상에서 구제 가능한 뇌조직이 확인되고 발병 4.5~24시간에 내원한 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 환자에서, 정맥내 tenecteplase가 표준 약물치료 대비 90일 기능적 예후를 향상시키는가, 그리고 그 안전성 대가는 무엇인가?

pico.population: [China] 566 patients with non-large vessel occlusion stroke and evidence of potentially salvageable tissue determined on perfusion imaging presenting within 4.5 to 24 hours of the time last seen well, recruited at 48 centers in China between June 2, 2023, and August 4, 2025 (median age, 68 [IQR, 59-75] years; 196 female [34.6%]).
pico.intervention: Intravenous tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum dose, 25 mg; n = 282) administered 4.5 to 24 hours after stroke onset.
pico.outcome: Primary efficacy outcome was an excellent functional outcome, defined as a modified Rankin Scale (mRS) score of 0 or 1 at 90 days: 123 of 282 (43.6%) with tenecteplase vs 97 of 284 (34.2%) with control (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).

pico_ko.population: [중국] 관류영상(perfusion imaging)에서 구제 가능한 뇌조직이 확인되고 마지막 정상 확인 시점으로부터 4.5~24시간 이내에 내원한 비대혈관폐색(non-LVO) 뇌졸중 환자 566명. 2023년 6월 2일~2025년 8월 4일 중국 48개 센터에서 모집(중앙값 연령 68세[IQR 59-75], 여성 196명[34.6%]).
pico_ko.intervention: 발병 4.5~24시간에 투여한 정맥내 tenecteplase(0.25 mg/kg; 최대 25 mg; n = 282).
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 효능 결과는 우수한 기능적 예후(90일째 mRS 0 또는 1)로 정의됨: tenecteplase군 282명 중 123명(43.6%) 대 대조군 284명 중 97명(34.2%) (risk ratio 1.28 [95% CI 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).

secondaryOutcomes: Symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours: 2.8% with tenecteplase vs 0% with standard medical treatment (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
Mortality within 90 days: 5.0% with tenecteplase vs 3.2% with control (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 36시간 이내 증상성 두개내출혈(symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage): tenecteplase군 2.8% 대 표준치료군 0% (risk difference 2.85% [95% CI 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90일 사망률: tenecteplase군 5.0% 대 대조군 3.2% (risk ratio 1.57 [95% CI 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: modified Rankin Scale: 0(증상 없음)~6(사망)으로 뇌졸중 후 장애 정도를 재는 척도로, 0~1은 사실상 후유장애가 없는 우수한 예후를 뜻함. 예: 이 연구의 일차 결과는 90일째 mRS 0~1 달성 비율(tenecteplase군 43.6%).
위험비: 두 군의 사건 발생 확률의 비로, 1보다 크면 해당 결과가 더 흔함을 의미. 예: RR 1.28 → tenecteplase군이 대조군보다 우수한 예후 도달이 상대적으로 28% 더 흔함.
위험차: 두 군의 사건 발생률 차이(절대값). 예: risk difference 2.85% → tenecteplase군의 증상성 두개내출혈 발생률이 대조군보다 절대적으로 2.85%p 높음.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위로, 위험비의 구간이 1을 포함하지 않으면 통계적으로 유의함. 예: RR 1.28의 95% CI 1.04-1.57 → 1을 넘지 않아 효능이 유의함.
p-value: 결과가 우연으로 생겼을 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 봄. 예: 일차 결과 P = .02 → 우연일 가능성이 낮아 유의함(반면 사망률 P = .28은 유의하지 않음).

practiceChange: For non-LVO acute ischemic stroke with perfusion-confirmed salvageable tissue presenting 4.5-24 hours after last-seen-well, IV tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg, max 25 mg) can now be considered as a perfusion-selected extended-window option, having improved mRS 0-1 at 90 days (43.6% vs 34.2%; RR 1.28).

Counsel patients/families on the trade-off: the benefit comes with a real bleeding cost — symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage rose from 0% to 2.8% (risk difference 2.85%; P = .004), while the 90-day mortality difference (5.0% vs 3.2%) was not statistically significant.

Do not extrapolate beyond the tested selection: eligibility hinged on advanced perfusion imaging confirming salvageable tissue and confirmed absence of large-vessel occlusion, so centers lacking rapid perfusion imaging or in populations outside a Chinese cohort should apply this cautiously.
practiceChange_ko: 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직이 확인되고 마지막 정상 확인 4.5~24시간에 내원한 non-LVO 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중에서, IV tenecteplase(0.25 mg/kg, 최대 25 mg)는 관류영상으로 선별된 확장시간창 선택지로 고려할 수 있음 — 90일 mRS 0~1을 개선(43.6% 대 34.2%; RR 1.28).
이득에는 실질적 출혈 대가가 따름을 환자·보호자에게 설명해야 함: 증상성 두개내출혈이 0%에서 2.8%로 증가(risk difference 2.85%; P = .004)했으며, 90일 사망률 차이(5.0% 대 3.2%)는 통계적으로 유의하지 않았음.
검증된 선별 기준을 벗어난 확대 적용은 금물: 자격 기준이 고급 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직을 확인하고 대혈관폐색(LVO) 부재를 확인하는 데 달려 있었으므로, 신속 관류영상이 없는 기관이나 중국 코호트 외 인구집단에서는 신중히 적용해야 함.
keyFindings: IV tenecteplase 4.5-24 h after onset in non-LVO stroke with salvageable tissue increased excellent functional outcome (mRS 0-1) at 90 days: 43.6% (123/282) vs 34.2% (97/284) with standard care (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).
Symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours was significantly higher with tenecteplase: 2.8% vs 0% (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90-day mortality was numerically higher but not statistically significant: 5.0% vs 3.2% (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
keyFindings_ko: 구제 가능한 조직이 있는 non-LVO 뇌졸중에서 발병 4.5~24시간의 IV tenecteplase는 90일 우수한 기능적 예후(mRS 0~1)를 증가시킴: 43.6%(123/282) 대 표준치료 34.2%(97/284) (risk ratio 1.28 [95% CI 1.04-1.57]; P = .02).
36시간 이내 증상성 두개내출혈은 tenecteplase군에서 유의하게 높았음: 2.8% 대 0% (risk difference 2.85% [95% CI 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004).
90일 사망률은 수치상 더 높았으나 통계적으로 유의하지 않았음: 5.0% 대 3.2% (risk ratio 1.57 [95% CI 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In perfusion-selected patients with non-LVO ischemic stroke presenting 4.5-24 hours after last-seen-well, IV tenecteplase modestly improves the chance of a near-disability-free outcome at 90 days but roughly triples-plus the absolute risk of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (from 0% to 2.8%). This positions late-window tenecteplase as a reasonable option only where advanced perfusion imaging confirms salvageable tissue and after shared decision-making about the bleeding trade-off. Mortality was not significantly increased, but the trial was not powered for that endpoint.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 마지막 정상 확인 4.5~24시간에 내원한 관류영상 선별 non-LVO 허혈성 뇌졸중 환자에서 IV tenecteplase는 90일째 사실상 무장애 예후 가능성을 완만하게 높이지만 증상성 두개내출혈의 절대위험을 0%에서 2.8%로 크게 증가시킴. 따라서 후기 시간창 tenecteplase는 고급 관류영상으로 구제 가능한 조직이 확인되고 출혈 위험에 대한 공유의사결정(shared decision-making)을 거친 경우에만 합리적 선택지가 됨. 사망률은 유의하게 증가하지 않았으나 이 시험은 사망 종말점에 대한 검정력을 갖추지 않았음.
arm2.limitations: Open-label design (only end points were blinded), leaving room for performance bias in care; single-country trial conducted entirely at 48 centers in China, limiting generalizability to other populations; strict enrollment required advanced perfusion imaging to confirm salvageable tissue and absence of large-vessel occlusion, so results do not apply to unselected patients or centers lacking such imaging; the trial was underpowered for mortality (wide CI 0.69-3.57), and no secondary efficacy outcomes were retrievable from the abstract/authoritative sources to further characterize the benefit-risk profile.
arm2.limitations_ko: 공개표지(open-label) 설계로 결과 판정만 눈가림되어 진료 과정에서 수행 편향(performance bias) 여지가 있음; 중국 48개 센터에서만 수행된 단일 국가 시험으로 다른 인구집단으로의 일반화가 제한됨; 등록 기준이 구제 가능한 조직과 대혈관폐색(LVO) 부재를 확인하는 고급 관류영상을 요구하여, 선별되지 않은 환자나 그런 영상이 없는 기관에는 적용 불가; 사망률에 대해서는 검정력이 부족했고(넓은 CI 0.69-3.57), 이득-위험 프로파일을 더 규명할 이차 효능 결과는 초록·권위 있는 출처에서 확보되지 않음.

paper.title: Tenecteplase for Acute Non-Large Vessel Occlusion 4.5 to 24 Hours After Ischemic Stroke: The OPTION Randomized Clinical Trial.
paper.abstract:
IMPORTANCE: The efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase in non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke beyond 4.5 hours after symptom onset remain uncertain.
OBJECTIVE: To assess the efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after stroke onset in patients with non-large vessel occlusion and salvageable brain tissue.
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This randomized, open-label, blinded end-point clinical trial was conducted at 48 centers in China. A total of 566 patients with non-large vessel occlusion stroke and evidence of potentially salvageable tissue determined on perfusion imaging presenting within 4.5 to 24 hours of the time last seen well were recruited between June 2, 2023, and August 4, 2025 (final follow-up, October 28, 2025).
INTERVENTIONS: Patients were randomly assigned 1:1 using a minimization algorithm to receive intravenous tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum dose, 25 mg; n = 282) or standard medical treatment (n = 284).
MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary efficacy outcome was an excellent functional outcome, defined as a score of 0 or 1 on the modified Rankin Scale at 90 days. Safety outcomes included symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours and mortality within 90 days.
RESULTS: Among the 570 patients randomized, 566 were included in the primary analysis (median age, 68 [IQR, 59-75] years; 196 female [34.6%]). An excellent functional outcome was observed in 123 of 282 patients (43.6%) in the tenecteplase group and 97 of 284 (34.2%) in the control group (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02). The incidence of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage at 2.8% was higher with tenecteplase than with standard medical treatment at 0% (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004), and the mortality at 90 days was 5.0% and 3.2%, respectively (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28).
CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Among patients with non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke and salvageable brain tissue, intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after onset resulted in a greater likelihood of an excellent functional outcome at 90 days than standard care but had an increased risk of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage.
TRIAL REGISTRATION: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT05752916.

arm1.title_ko: 패혈증에서 심박수 관련 심근 손상 재고: 심방세동, 심박수, cardiac troponin T 및 장기 사망률
arm1.clinicalQuestion: In adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support, what are the independent and combined prognostic contributions of atrial fibrillation (AF), highest recorded heart rate, and high-sensitivity cardiac troponin T (hs-cTnT) to 1-year mortality, and is troponin elevation attributable to rate-related demand ischaemia?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 혈압상승제(vasopressor)가 필요한 성인 패혈증 환자에서 atrial fibrillation(AF), 최고 기록 심박수, high-sensitivity cardiac troponin T(hs-cTnT)가 1년 사망률에 미치는 독립적·복합적 예후 기여도는 무엇이며, troponin 상승이 심박수 관련 수요 허혈(demand ischaemia)로 설명되는가?

pico.population: [Sweden] Adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support admitted to critical care units at Danderyd University Hospital, Stockholm, between March 2012 and September 2021, fulfilling Sepsis-3 criteria with hs-cTnT measured within 48 hours of sepsis onset; among 586 included patients, 177 (30%) had pre-existing AF and 112 (19%) developed new-onset AF, and elevated hs-cTnT (≥15 ng/L) was present in 546 (93%). Median age was 68 (IQR 58–76) in no AF, 79 (72–85) in pre-existing AF and 74 (67–80) in new-onset AF; female 42%/29%/35% respectively.
pico.intervention: Exposures were AF status (classified as no AF, pre-existing AF or new-onset AF) and highest recorded heart rate during the first 72 hours, examined in relation to hs-cTnT concentrations (elevated defined as ≥15 ng/L).
pico.comparison: Patients with no atrial fibrillation (no AF).
pico.outcome: Primary outcome was the association between highest plasma hs-cTnT and all-cause 1-year mortality in patients with and without AF. One-year mortality increased progressively across hs-cTnT quartiles, with an additive increase among patients with concomitant AF; after multivariable adjustment log-transformed hs-cTnT remained associated with 1-year mortality (HR 1.3, 95% CI 1.1–1.4, p<0.001). Highest recorded heart rate was not associated with hs-cTnT or mortality.

pico_ko.population: [스웨덴] 2012년 3월부터 2021년 9월까지 Stockholm의 Danderyd University Hospital 중환자실에 입원한, 혈압상승제(vasopressor)가 필요한 성인 패혈증 환자로 Sepsis-3 기준을 충족하고 패혈증 발생 48시간 이내에 hs-cTnT를 측정한 경우. 포함된 586명 중 177명(30%)은 기존 AF, 112명(19%)은 신규 발생 AF였고, 상승된 hs-cTnT(≥15 ng/L)는 546명(93%)에서 존재. 중앙값 연령은 no AF 68세(IQR 58–76), 기존 AF 79세(72–85), 신규 AF 74세(67–80)였고 여성 비율은 각각 42%/29%/35%.
pico_ko.intervention: 노출 변수는 AF 상태(no AF, 기존 AF, 신규 발생 AF로 분류)와 첫 72시간 동안의 최고 기록 심박수였으며, hs-cTnT 농도(상승 기준 ≥15 ng/L)와의 관계를 분석함.
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 결과는 최고 혈장 hs-cTnT와 전원인 1년 사망률의 연관성(AF 유무별). 1년 사망률은 hs-cTnT quartile에 걸쳐 점진적으로 증가했고 AF 동반 시 위험이 additive하게 증가했으며, 다변량 보정 후 log-변환 hs-cTnT는 1년 사망률과 연관됨(HR 1.3, 95% CI 1.1–1.4, p<0.001). 최고 기록 심박수는 hs-cTnT나 사망률과 연관 없음.

secondaryOutcomes: One-year mortality was higher in pre-existing AF (crude HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2) and new-onset AF (crude HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5) versus no AF; after multivariable adjustment, pre-existing AF HR 1.4 (95% CI 0.99–1.9, p=0.055) and new-onset AF HR 1.5 (95% CI 1.1–2.2, p=0.014).
AF status accounted for only 1.2% of the variability in hs-cTnT concentrations and 2.2% of the variability in highest recorded heart rate; by comparison LVEF explained 9.4% of hs-cTnT variability.
Highest recorded heart rate was not associated with hs-cTnT concentrations or with 1-year mortality on multivariable analysis.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 1년 사망률은 no AF 대비 기존 AF(보정 전 HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2)와 신규 AF(보정 전 HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5)에서 더 높았고, 다변량 보정 후 기존 AF HR 1.4(95% CI 0.99–1.9, p=0.055), 신규 AF HR 1.5(95% CI 1.1–2.2, p=0.014).
AF 상태는 hs-cTnT 농도 변동의 1.2%, 최고 기록 심박수 변동의 2.2%만 설명했으며, 대조적으로 LVEF는 hs-cTnT 변동의 9.4%를 설명함.
최고 기록 심박수는 다변량 분석에서 hs-cTnT 농도 또는 1년 사망률과 연관되지 않음.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 위험비(hazard ratio): 특정 시점에 사건(사망) 발생 속도의 비. 1보다 크면 위험 증가. 예: 기존 AF의 보정 전 HR 2.4 → no AF 대비 1년 사망 위험이 약 2.4배 높음.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위로, 1을 포함하면 통계적으로 유의하지 않음. 예: 기존 AF의 보정 HR 1.4(95% CI 0.99–1.9)는 1을 포함해 유의성이 경계선.
우연만으로 이 결과가 나올 확률로 보통 0.05 미만이면 유의하다고 봄. 예: log-hs-cTnT의 p<0.001 → 사망률과의 연관이 우연일 가능성이 매우 낮음.
설명된 변동 비율: 한 변수가 다른 변수의 값 차이를 몇 % 설명하는지. 예: AF가 hs-cTnT 변동의 1.2%만 설명 → AF는 troponin 상승을 거의 설명하지 못함.

practiceChange: In septic patients on vasopressors, do not dismiss an elevated hs-cTnT as merely rate-related demand ischaemia — heart rate explained essentially none of the troponin variability and was not linked to mortality, so tachycardia should not be invoked to explain away myocardial injury.

Recognize concomitant AF (pre-existing or new-onset) plus elevated hs-cTnT as a high-risk phenotype: mortality rose progressively across troponin quartiles with an additive increase when AF was present, flagging these patients for closer monitoring and goals-of-care discussion.

Do not treat this observational, single-centre data as justification for rate-control targeting to lower troponin or mortality; the study shows association only and heart rate was not prognostically relevant, so no rate-lowering intervention is supported.
practiceChange_ko: 혈압상승제를 사용하는 패혈증 환자에서 상승된 hs-cTnT를 단순한 심박수 관련 수요 허혈로 치부하지 말 것 — 심박수는 troponin 변동을 사실상 전혀 설명하지 못했고 사망률과도 무관했으므로, 빈맥으로 심근 손상을 합리화해서는 안 됨.
AF 동반(기존 또는 신규) + hs-cTnT 상승을 고위험 표현형으로 인식할 것: 사망률이 troponin quartile에 따라 점진 증가하고 AF 동반 시 additive하게 상승하므로, 이들 환자는 면밀한 모니터링과 치료 목표 논의 대상으로 삼음.
이 관찰적·단일기관 자료를 troponin이나 사망률을 낮추기 위한 rate-control 목표 설정의 근거로 삼지 말 것; 연관성만 보였고 심박수는 예후적 의미가 없어 심박수 저하 중재를 뒷받침하지 않음.
keyFindings: Among 586 vasopressor-requiring sepsis patients (30% pre-existing AF, 19% new-onset AF, 93% with hs-cTnT ≥15 ng/L), AF explained only 1.2% of hs-cTnT variability and 2.2% of heart rate variability, and heart rate was not associated with troponin or mortality.

Crude 1-year mortality was higher with pre-existing AF (HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2) and new-onset AF (HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5) versus no AF; on multivariable adjustment new-onset AF remained significant (HR 1.5, 95% CI 1.1–2.2, p=0.014) while pre-existing AF was borderline (HR 1.4, 95% CI 0.99–1.9, p=0.055).

One-year mortality increased progressively across hs-cTnT quartiles with an additive increase among AF patients, and log-transformed hs-cTnT remained independently associated with mortality after adjustment (HR 1.3, 95% CI 1.1–1.4, p<0.001).
keyFindings_ko: 혈압상승제가 필요한 패혈증 환자 586명(기존 AF 30%, 신규 AF 19%, hs-cTnT ≥15 ng/L 93%)에서 AF는 hs-cTnT 변동의 1.2%, 심박수 변동의 2.2%만 설명했고, 심박수는 troponin·사망률과 무관했음.
보정 전 1년 사망률은 no AF 대비 기존 AF(HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8–3.2), 신규 AF(HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3–2.5)에서 높았고, 다변량 보정 후 신규 AF는 유의(HR 1.5, 95% CI 1.1–2.2, p=0.014), 기존 AF는 경계선(HR 1.4, 95% CI 0.99–1.9, p=0.055)이었음.
1년 사망률은 hs-cTnT quartile에 걸쳐 점진 증가했고 AF 환자에서 additive하게 상승했으며, log-변환 hs-cTnT는 보정 후에도 사망률과 독립적으로 연관(HR 1.3, 95% CI 1.1–1.4, p<0.001).
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: In vasopressor-dependent sepsis, an elevated hs-cTnT should not be reflexively attributed to tachycardia/demand ischaemia — heart rate explained virtually none of the troponin variability and carried no prognostic weight. Instead, elevated troponin plus AF marks a distinct high-risk subgroup with additive 1-year mortality, useful for risk stratification and prognostic conversations rather than as a target for rate-lowering therapy.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 혈압상승제 의존 패혈증에서 상승된 hs-cTnT를 반사적으로 빈맥/수요 허혈 탓으로 돌려서는 안 됨 — 심박수는 troponin 변동을 사실상 설명하지 못했고 예후적 의미도 없었음. 오히려 troponin 상승 + AF는 1년 사망률이 additive하게 높은 별개의 고위험 아군을 나타내며, 이는 심박수 저하 치료의 표적이 아니라 위험 층화와 예후 상담에 유용함.
arm1.limitations: Single-centre, retrospective secondary analysis of the SET cohort at one Swedish university hospital, limiting generalizability; groups were imbalanced at baseline (older age and lower female proportion in AF groups), and although multivariable Cox adjustment was performed, residual confounding is likely. Only the highest hs-cTnT and highest heart rate within fixed windows were used (no serial dynamics), heart rate does not capture rhythm burden or rate control, causality cannot be inferred from association, and after adjustment the pre-existing AF association was only borderline (p=0.055).
arm1.limitations_ko: 스웨덴 단일 대학병원 SET 코호트의 후향적 이차 분석으로 일반화에 제한이 있음; 기저 특성이 불균형(AF군에서 고령, 여성 비율 낮음)했고 다변량 Cox 보정을 했으나 잔여 교란 가능성이 높음. 고정 구간 내 최고 hs-cTnT와 최고 심박수만 사용(연속 변화 미반영)했고, 심박수는 리듬 부담이나 rate control을 반영하지 못하며, 연관성으로 인과를 추론할 수 없고, 보정 후 기존 AF의 연관성은 경계선(p=0.055)에 그침.

paper.title: Rethinking rate-related myocardial injury in sepsis: atrial fibrillation, heart rate, cardiac troponin T and long-term mortality.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: Atrial fibrillation (AF), elevated heart rate and elevated high-sensitivity cardiac troponin T (hs-cTnT) are common in sepsis, but their independent and combined prognostic significance remains uncertain.
METHODS: This secondary analysis of the retrospective Sepsis and Elevated Troponin cohort study included adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support admitted to critical care units at Danderyd University Hospital, Stockholm, Sweden, between March 2012 and September 2021. Eligible patients fulfilled Sepsis-3 criteria and had hs-cTnT measured within 48 hours of sepsis onset. Patients were classified as having no AF, pre-existing AF or new-onset AF. AF status and highest recorded heart rate during the first 72 hours were examined in relation to troponin concentrations and 1-year mortality using linear regression, Kaplan-Meier analysis and multivariable Cox proportional hazards regression.
RESULTS: Among 586 included patients, 177 (30%) had pre-existing AF and 112 (19%) developed new-onset AF. Elevated hs-cTnT (≥15 ng/L) was present in 546 patients (93%). Patients with AF had higher hs-cTnT concentrations and higher recorded heart rates. AF accounted for only 1.2% of the variability in hs-cTnT concentrations and 2.2% of the variability in highest recorded heart rate. Heart rate was not associated with hs-cTnT concentrations or mortality. One-year mortality was higher in patients with pre-existing AF (HR 2.4, 95% CI 1.8-3.2) and new-onset AF (HR 1.8, 95% CI 1.3-2.5) than in those without AF. One-year mortality increased progressively across hs-cTnT quartiles, with an additive increase in risk among patients with concomitant AF. After multivariable adjustment, AF and hs-cTnT concentrations remained independently associated with 1-year mortality, whereas highest recorded heart rate did not.
CONCLUSIONS: In adults with sepsis requiring vasopressor support, AF and elevated hs-cTnT were associated with increased 1-year mortality, with additive prognostic value independent of highest recorded heart rate. Concomitant AF and troponin elevation identify a high-risk subgroup of sepsis patients whose myocardial injury should not be attributed solely to rate-related demand ischaemia.

arm2.title_ko: 외상 및 출혈에서 O형 전혈을 이용한 병원 전 소생술 (TOWAR 시험)
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In injured patients with hemorrhagic shock, does prehospital transfusion of type O whole blood reduce 30-day all-cause mortality compared with as-indicated blood components, and does the storage age of whole blood affect outcomes?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 출혈성 쇼크가 있는 외상 환자에서, 병원 전 O형 전혈(whole blood) 수혈이 필요에 따른 혈액 성분(component) 수혈에 비해 30일 전체 사망률을 낮추는가, 그리고 전혈의 보관 기간(storage age)이 결과에 영향을 미치는가?

pico.population: [USA] Injured trauma patients transported by air medical bases who were in hemorrhagic shock (eligibility: SBP ≤90 mmHg with HR ≥108, or any SBP ≤70 mmHg; ages 18–90); of 1020 eligible patients transported to hospitals by the air bases, 715 were assigned to whole blood and 305 to blood components (695 and 298, respectively, included in the primary analysis).
pico.intervention: Up to 2 units of prehospital type O whole blood.
pico.comparison: As-indicated blood components (plasma, red cells, or both) for prehospital transfusion.
pico.outcome: Death from any cause within 30 days after randomization: 25.9% in the whole-blood group vs 20.5% in the component group (adjusted odds ratio 1.24; 95% CI 0.87 to 1.76; P = 0.24).

pico_ko.population: [미국] 항공 의료기지(air medical base)를 통해 이송된 출혈성 쇼크 상태의 외상 환자(적격 기준: SBP ≤90 mmHg 이면서 HR ≥108, 또는 SBP ≤70 mmHg; 연령 18–90세); 항공기지가 병원으로 이송한 적격 환자 1020명 중 715명이 whole blood, 305명이 blood components에 배정되었고, 각각 695명과 298명이 일차 분석에 포함됨.
pico_ko.intervention: 병원 전 O형 전혈(whole blood) 최대 2단위.
pico_ko.comparison: 필요에 따라 투여한 혈액 성분(plasma, red cells, 또는 둘 다)의 병원 전 수혈.
pico_ko.outcome: 무작위배정 후 30일 이내 전체 사망: whole-blood군 25.9% 대 component군 20.5% (adjusted odds ratio 1.24; 95% CI 0.87–1.76; P = 0.24).

secondaryOutcomes: Observational storage-age substudy: 30-day mortality was 27.1% among 210 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 15 to 21 days vs 26.4% among 443 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 1 to 14 days (adjusted odds ratio 0.99; 95% CI 0.74 to 1.32).
Safety: no substantial between-group differences in adverse events were observed (no specific statistics reported in the abstract).
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 관찰적 보관기간(storage-age) 하위연구: 30일 사망률은 보관기간 15–21일 전혈을 받은 210명에서 27.1%, 1–14일 전혈을 받은 443명에서 26.4% (adjusted odds ratio 0.99; 95% CI 0.74–1.32).
안전성: 군 간 이상반응(adverse events)에 실질적 차이는 관찰되지 않음(초록에 구체적 통계치는 보고되지 않음).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 교란변수를 보정한 오즈비: 1보다 크면 해당 군의 사건 발생 오즈가 높고, 1보다 작으면 낮음. 예: 일차결과 adjusted OR 1.24 → component군 대비 whole-blood군의 30일 사망 오즈가 약 24% 높은 방향이나, 통계적으로 유의하지 않음.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 있을 것으로 추정되는 범위이며, 1(효과 없음)을 포함하면 유의하지 않음. 예: 95% CI 0.87–1.76 → 1을 포함하므로 두 군 사망 차이가 유의하지 않음.
우연만으로 이 정도 차이가 나타날 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 유의하다고 봄. 예: P = 0.24 → 0.05보다 크므로 두 군 간 30일 사망률 차이는 통계적으로 유의하지 않음.

practiceChange: Do NOT adopt prehospital whole blood as superior to component therapy for mortality: in this phase 3 cluster-RCT, 2 units of type O whole blood did not lower 30-day mortality vs as-indicated components (25.9% vs 20.5%; adjusted OR 1.24, 95% CI 0.87–1.76, P=0.24), so either strategy remains acceptable and choice can be driven by logistics, cost, and product availability.

Continue prehospital blood transfusion itself for traumatic hemorrhagic shock — the trial compared two transfusion strategies, not transfusion vs none, so the established benefit of early prehospital blood is not challenged.

Storage age of whole blood (15–21 vs 1–14 days) need not be a barrier to use: the observational substudy showed no mortality difference (27.1% vs 26.4%; adjusted OR 0.99, 95% CI 0.74–1.32), supporting operational flexibility in inventory management.
practiceChange_ko: 병원 전 whole blood를 component 요법보다 사망률 측면에서 우월한 것으로 채택하지 말 것: 이 phase 3 cluster-RCT에서 O형 전혈 2단위는 필요에 따른 component 대비 30일 사망률을 낮추지 못함(25.9% 대 20.5%; adjusted OR 1.24, 95% CI 0.87–1.76, P=0.24). 따라서 두 전략 모두 수용 가능하며 선택은 물류·비용·제제 가용성에 따라 결정할 수 있음.
외상성 출혈성 쇼크에서 병원 전 수혈 자체는 계속 시행할 것 — 본 시험은 수혈 대 무수혈이 아니라 두 수혈 전략을 비교한 것이므로, 조기 병원 전 수혈의 기존 이점은 부정되지 않음.
전혈의 보관기간(15–21일 대 1–14일)이 사용의 장벽이 될 필요는 없음: 관찰적 하위연구에서 사망률 차이가 없었으며(27.1% 대 26.4%; adjusted OR 0.99, 95% CI 0.74–1.32), 재고 관리의 운영적 유연성을 뒷받침함.
keyFindings: In 993 analyzed patients (695 whole blood, 298 components), 30-day all-cause mortality was 25.9% with whole blood vs 20.5% with components (adjusted OR 1.24; 95% CI 0.87–1.76; P=0.24) — no significant mortality benefit from whole blood.

The observational storage-age substudy found nearly identical 30-day mortality for older (15–21 day) vs fresher (1–14 day) whole blood: 27.1% (n=210) vs 26.4% (n=443) (adjusted OR 0.99; 95% CI 0.74–1.32).
No substantial between-group differences in adverse events were observed, and the trial concluded whole blood did not lower 30-day mortality compared with blood components.
keyFindings_ko: 분석 대상 993명(whole blood 695명, components 298명)에서 30일 전체 사망률은 whole blood 25.9% 대 components 20.5% (adjusted OR 1.24; 95% CI 0.87–1.76; P=0.24)로, whole blood의 유의한 사망 이득 없음.
관찰적 보관기간 하위연구에서 오래된(15–21일) 전혈과 신선한(1–14일) 전혈의 30일 사망률이 거의 동일함: 27.1%(n=210) 대 26.4%(n=443) (adjusted OR 0.99; 95% CI 0.74–1.32).
군 간 이상반응(adverse events)에 실질적 차이가 없었으며, 전혈이 혈액 성분 대비 30일 사망률을 낮추지 못한다고 결론지음.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In adults with prehospital traumatic hemorrhagic shock, giving up to 2 units of type O whole blood did not improve 30-day survival compared with as-indicated blood components (25.9% vs 20.5%; adjusted OR 1.24, 95% CI 0.87–1.76). Both strategies appear clinically equivalent for mortality, so the choice can be guided by logistics, cost, and supply rather than a presumed survival advantage. Storage age of whole blood up to 21 days did not affect mortality, supporting flexible inventory practices.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 병원 전 외상성 출혈성 쇼크 성인에서 O형 전혈 최대 2단위 투여는 필요에 따른 혈액 성분 대비 30일 생존을 개선하지 못함(25.9% 대 20.5%; adjusted OR 1.24, 95% CI 0.87–1.76). 두 전략은 사망률 측면에서 임상적으로 동등해 보이므로, 선택은 가정된 생존 이득이 아니라 물류·비용·공급에 따라 결정할 수 있음. 21일까지의 전혈 보관기간은 사망률에 영향을 주지 않아 유연한 재고 운영을 뒷받침함.
arm2.limitations: Cluster-randomized by air medical base with a 2:1 allocation and 1-month blocks, which can introduce between-group imbalance (baseline comparability was not reported in the abstract); the trial was likely powered for a larger effect and the 5.4-percentage-point higher point estimate in the whole-blood group cannot exclude harm within the wide CI. The storage-age comparison was observational (not randomized) and thus subject to confounding, and only abstract-level data (no full text) were available, limiting appraisal of secondary outcomes and subgroup effects. Findings are from US air medical transport and may not generalize to ground EMS or other systems.
arm2.limitations_ko: 항공 의료기지 단위의 cluster 무작위배정(2:1 배정, 1개월 블록)으로 군 간 불균형이 발생할 수 있으며(초록에 baseline 비교성 미보고), 시험은 더 큰 효과를 검출하도록 설계되었을 가능성이 크고 whole-blood군에서 5.4%p 높은 점추정치는 넓은 CI 내에서 해악 가능성을 배제하지 못함. 보관기간 비교는 무작위배정이 아닌 관찰적 분석이라 교란에 취약하며, 전문(full text) 없이 초록 수준 자료만 이용 가능해 secondary outcomes 및 하위군 효과 평가가 제한됨. 결과는 미국 항공 의료 이송 기반이므로 지상 EMS나 다른 시스템에 일반화되지 않을 수 있음.

paper.title: Prehospital Resuscitation with Type O Whole Blood for Trauma and Hemorrhage.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: Blood transfusion before arrival at a hospital reduces mortality from traumatic hemorrhage and shock. Whether transfusion with whole blood is more beneficial than transfusion with blood components is uncertain, as are the effects of the length of time that blood products are in storage between donation and transfusion.
METHODS: In this pragmatic, multicenter, phase 3, cluster-randomized trial, we assigned 44 air medical bases in a 2:1 ratio to the use of up to 2 units of whole blood or as-indicated blood components (plasma, red cells, or both) for prehospital transfusion in trauma patients during 1-month blocks. The primary outcome was death from any cause within 30 days after randomization. An observational substudy assessed outcomes according to the storage age of whole blood.
RESULTS: Of 1020 eligible patients transported to hospitals by the air bases, 715 were assigned to receive whole blood and 305 to receive blood components; 695 and 298, respectively, were included in the primary analysis. Mortality at 30 days was 25.9% in the whole-blood group and 20.5% in the component group (adjusted odds ratio, 1.24; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.87 to 1.76; P = 0.24). No substantial between-group differences in adverse events were observed. In the observational substudy, 30-day mortality was 27.1% among 210 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 15 to 21 days and 26.4% among 443 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 1 to 14 days (adjusted odds ratio, 0.99; 95% CI, 0.74 to 1.32).
CONCLUSIONS: In injured patients with hemorrhagic shock, the use of whole blood for prehospital transfusion did not result in lower 30-day mortality than the use of blood components. (Funded by the Defense Health Agency Research Technology Portfolio Management, Combat Casualty Portfolio; TOWAR ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04684719.).
paper.journal: The New England journal of medicine

arm1.title_ko: 가능성 있는 sepsis로 IV 항생제 치료를 받은 면역저하 환자에서 세균 감염의 가능성
arm1.clinicalQuestion: Among adults empirically treated for possible sepsis in the emergency department, what proportion of immunocompromised versus nonimmunocompromised patients actually had a definite or probable bacterial infection in retrospect, and what alternative diagnoses mimicked bacterial sepsis?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 응급실에서 가능성 있는 sepsis에 대해 경험적으로 치료받은 성인 중, 면역저하 환자와 비면역저하 환자에서 후향적으로 실제 확정적(definite) 또는 개연적(probable) 세균 감염이 있었던 비율은 각각 얼마이며, 세균성 sepsis를 모방한 대체 진단은 무엇인가?

pico.population: [USA] All adults treated for possible sepsis (blood culture draw, lactate measurement, and IV antibiotic administration) within 6 hours of emergency department (ED) arrival at nine hospitals between 2022 and 2024; 350 hospitalizations randomly selected for structured medical record review, oversampling for immunocompromised status using administrative codes; 186 (53.1%) confirmed immunocompromised and 164 (46.9%) nonimmunocompromised.
pico.intervention: Confirmed immunocompromised status per Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) criteria (186 patients, 53.1%), with post hoc likelihood of bacterial infection determined by structured medical record review.
pico.comparison: Nonimmunocompromised patients treated empirically for possible sepsis (164 patients, 46.9%).
pico.outcome: Definite or probable bacterial infection was identified in 92 of 186 (49.5%) immunocompromised patients vs. 97 of 164 (59.1%) nonimmunocompromised patients (p = 0.07).

pico_ko.population: [미국] 2022년부터 2024년 사이 9개 병원에서 응급실(ED) 도착 6시간 이내에 가능성 있는 sepsis에 대해 치료받은(혈액배양 채취, lactate 측정, IV 항생제 투여) 모든 성인; 행정 코드를 이용해 면역저하 상태를 oversampling하여 350건의 입원을 무작위로 선정해 구조화된 의무기록 검토를 시행; 186명(53.1%)이 면역저하로, 164명(46.9%)이 비면역저하로 확인됨.
pico_ko.intervention: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention(CDC) 기준에 따라 확인된 면역저하 상태(186명, 53.1%)로, 구조화된 의무기록 검토를 통해 세균 감염 가능성을 post hoc으로 판정함.
pico_ko.comparison: 가능성 있는 sepsis에 대해 경험적으로 치료받은 비면역저하 환자(164명, 46.9%).
pico_ko.outcome: 확정적 또는 개연적 세균 감염은 면역저하 환자 186명 중 92명(49.5%) vs. 비면역저하 환자 164명 중 97명(59.1%)에서 확인됨(p = 0.07).

secondaryOutcomes: Immunocompromised patients more commonly presented with fevers, chills or rigors (66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001).
ED clinicians more often documented concern for sepsis in immunocompromised patients (74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).

Among immunocompromised patients without definite/probable bacterial infection, common alternative etiologies were viral or fungal infection, febrile neutropenia without clinical evidence of bacterial infection, progression of malignancy, and medication toxicity, whereas chronic heart or lung disease exacerbations, hypovolemia, and hypervolemia predominated among nonimmunocompromised patients.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 면역저하 환자는 발열, 오한 또는 rigor를 더 흔하게 보였다(66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001).
ED 임상의는 면역저하 환자에서 sepsis에 대한 우려를 더 자주 기록했다(74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).
확정적/개연적 세균 감염이 없었던 면역저하 환자에서 흔한 대체 원인은 바이러스 또는 진균 감염, 세균 감염의 임상적 근거가 없는 febrile neutropenia, 악성종양의 진행, 약물 독성이었던 반면, 비면역저하 환자에서는 만성 심장 또는 폐질환의 악화, hypovolemia, hypervolemia가 우세했다.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 관찰된 차이가 우연만으로 나타날 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 본다. 예: 세균 감염 비율 49.5% vs. 59.1%의 p = 0.07 → 통상적 기준(0.05)에서 유의하지 않아 두 군 간 차이가 우연일 가능성을 배제하기 어려움; 반면 발열·오한 66.0% vs. 32.0%의 p < 0.001 → 우연일 가능성이 매우 낮아 유의한 차이.

practiceChange: Recognize that empiric IV antibiotics for possible sepsis are frequently given to patients who do not have bacterial infection — in this cohort only ~49.5% of immunocompromised and ~59.1% of nonimmunocompromised patients had definite/probable bacterial infection in retrospect — so continue prompt empiric coverage but pair it with aggressive, protocolized reassessment and de-escalation once cultures and clinical trajectory clarify.

In immunocompromised patients presenting with fever/chills and a sepsis-like picture, actively broaden the differential to include viral/fungal infection, febrile neutropenia without bacterial source, malignancy progression, and medication toxicity, and pursue targeted non-bacterial diagnostics rather than anchoring on bacterial sepsis alone.

Do NOT use these data to withhold or delay initial empiric antibiotics in immunocompromised patients with possible sepsis; the retrospective ~50% bacterial rate cannot identify non-bacterial cases prospectively at presentation, and the study reports no mortality or safety outcome supporting delayed treatment.
practiceChange_ko: 가능성 있는 sepsis에 대한 경험적 IV 항생제가 실제로는 세균 감염이 없는 환자에게 빈번히 투여됨을 인식하라 — 본 코호트에서 후향적으로 면역저하 환자의 약 49.5%, 비면역저하 환자의 약 59.1%만 확정적/개연적 세균 감염이었음 — 따라서 신속한 경험적 치료는 유지하되 배양 결과와 임상 경과가 명확해지면 적극적·프로토콜화된 재평가 및 de-escalation을 병행하라.
발열·오한과 sepsis 유사 양상으로 내원한 면역저하 환자에서는 바이러스/진균 감염, 세균 병소가 없는 febrile neutropenia, 악성종양 진행, 약물 독성까지 감별진단을 적극 확대하고, 세균성 sepsis에만 고정(anchoring)되지 말고 표적화된 비세균 진단 검사를 시행하라.
이 데이터를 근거로 가능성 있는 sepsis가 있는 면역저하 환자에서 초기 경험적 항생제를 보류하거나 지연시키지 말라; 후향적 약 50%의 세균 감염 비율은 내원 시점에서 비세균 증례를 전향적으로 식별해주지 못하며, 본 연구는 치료 지연을 뒷받침하는 사망률이나 안전성 결과를 보고하지 않았다.
keyFindings: Only 92 of 186 (49.5%) immunocompromised patients treated empirically for possible sepsis had definite or probable bacterial infection in retrospect, vs. 97 of 164 (59.1%) nonimmunocompromised patients (p = 0.07).
Immunocompromised patients more commonly presented with fevers, chills or rigors (66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001) and ED clinicians more often documented concern for sepsis (74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).

Sepsis mimics differed by host: viral/fungal infection, febrile neutropenia without bacterial evidence, malignancy progression, and medication toxicity predominated in immunocompromised patients, whereas chronic heart/lung disease exacerbations, hypovolemia, and hypervolemia predominated in nonimmunocompromised patients.
keyFindings_ko: 가능성 있는 sepsis로 경험적 치료를 받은 면역저하 환자 186명 중 92명(49.5%)만 후향적으로 확정적 또는 개연적 세균 감염이 있었고, 비면역저하 환자는 164명 중 97명(59.1%)이었다(p = 0.07).
면역저하 환자는 발열, 오한 또는 rigor를 더 흔하게 보였고(66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001), ED 임상의는 sepsis 우려를 더 자주 기록했다(74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01).
sepsis 모방 질환은 숙주에 따라 달랐다: 면역저하 환자에서는 바이러스/진균 감염, 세균 근거 없는 febrile neutropenia, 악성종양 진행, 약물 독성이 우세했고, 비면역저하 환자에서는 만성 심/폐질환 악화, hypovolemia, hypervolemia가 우세했다.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: About half of immunocompromised patients (49.5%) and roughly three-fifths of nonimmunocompromised patients (59.1%) empirically treated for possible sepsis turned out to have definite or probable bacterial infection, highlighting that a large fraction of sepsis presentations — especially in immunocompromised hosts — are driven by non-bacterial mimics. Clinicians should still start prompt empiric antibiotics but build in structured early reassessment and a broad differential (viral/fungal infection, febrile neutropenia, malignancy progression, drug toxicity) to enable timely de-escalation.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 가능성 있는 sepsis로 경험적 치료를 받은 면역저하 환자의 약 절반(49.5%), 비면역저하 환자의 약 3/5(59.1%)만이 확정적 또는 개연적 세균 감염으로 판명되어, sepsis 양상의 상당 부분 — 특히 면역저하 숙주에서 — 이 비세균성 모방 질환에 의한 것임을 보여준다. 임상의는 여전히 신속한 경험적 항생제를 시작하되, 구조화된 조기 재평가와 폭넓은 감별진단(바이러스/진균 감염, febrile neutropenia, 악성종양 진행, 약물 독성)을 마련해 적시의 de-escalation이 가능하도록 해야 한다.
arm1.limitations: Retrospective structured medical record review at nine hospitals with only 350 patients selected and intentional oversampling of immunocompromised status using administrative codes, limiting generalizability and precluding true prevalence estimates. Bacterial infection likelihood was determined post hoc/in retrospect (subject to reviewer judgment and misclassification) rather than by a prospectively applicable diagnostic standard, and the difference in the primary outcome (49.5% vs. 59.1%) was not statistically significant (p = 0.07). No patient-centered outcomes such as mortality, antibiotic days, or harms of overtreatment were reported, so the data cannot directly guide when to withhold therapy.
arm1.limitations_ko: 9개 병원에서 시행된 후향적 구조화 의무기록 검토로 350명만 선정되었고 행정 코드를 이용해 면역저하 상태를 의도적으로 oversampling하여 일반화가 제한되며 실제 유병률 추정이 불가능하다. 세균 감염 가능성은 전향적으로 적용 가능한 진단 기준이 아니라 후향적/post hoc으로(검토자의 판단과 오분류에 취약) 판정되었고, 일차 결과의 차이(49.5% vs. 59.1%)는 통계적으로 유의하지 않았다(p = 0.07). 사망률, 항생제 사용일수, 과잉치료의 위해 등 환자 중심 결과가 보고되지 않아 언제 치료를 보류할지에 대한 직접적 지침을 제공하지 못한다.

paper.title: Likelihood of Bacterial Infection in Immunocompromised Patients Treated With IV Antibiotics for Possible Sepsis.
paper.abstract:
OBJECTIVES: Immunocompromised patients with possible sepsis are typically treated immediately with empiric antibiotics given their high risk for poor outcomes. Clinical presentations of sepsis, however, are protean and many nonbacterial infections and noninfectious conditions can present similarly. We assessed the likelihood of bacterial infections in retrospect in immunocompromised vs. nonimmunocompromised patients treated empirically for sepsis.
DESIGN, SETTING AND PATIENTS: We identified all adults treated for possible sepsis (blood culture draw, lactate measurement, and IV antibiotic administration) within 6 hours of emergency department (ED) arrival at nine hospitals between 2022 and 2024 and randomly selected 350 hospitalizations for structured medical record review, oversampling for immunocompromised status using administrative codes. Reviews were used to confirm immunocompromised status per Centers for Disease Control and Prevention criteria and determine post hoc likelihoods of bacterial infection.
INTERVENTIONS: None.
MEASUREMENTS AND MAIN RESULTS: Of the 350 patients, 186 (53.1%) were confirmed as immunocompromised and 164 (46.9%) as nonimmunocompromised. Immunocompromised patients more commonly presented with fevers, chills or rigors (66.0% vs. 32.0%, p < 0.001) and ED clinicians more often documented concern for sepsis (74% vs. 62%, p = 0.01) compared with nonimmunocompromised patients. Definite or probable bacterial infection was identified in 92 of 186 (49.5%) immunocompromised patients vs. 97 of 164 (59.1%) nonimmunocompromised patients (p = 0.07). Among immunocompromised patients without definite or probable bacterial infection, common alternative etiologies included viral or fungal infection, febrile neutropenia without clinical evidence of bacterial infection, progression of malignancy, and medication toxicity, whereas chronic heart or lung disease exacerbations, hypovolemia, and hypervolemia predominated among nonimmunocompromised patients.
CONCLUSIONS: Only about one-half of immunocompromised patients treated empirically for possible sepsis had definite or probable bacterial infection in retrospect, compared with approximately three-fifths in nonimmunocompromised patients. These findings underscore the complexity of sepsis diagnosis, particularly in immunocompromised patients, and highlight important differences in the conditions that mimic bacterial sepsis in immunocompromised vs. nonimmunocompromised hosts.

arm2.title_ko: Ibuprofen에 Acetaminophen(Paracetamol) 또는 Opioid 진통제를 추가한 소아 근골격계 손상 치료: 두 개의 무작위 임상시험
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In children with acute nonoperative musculoskeletal limb injury, does adding an opioid (hydromorphone) or a nonopioid (acetaminophen) to ibuprofen reduce pain scores at 60 minutes compared with ibuprofen alone?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 급성 비수술적 근골격계 사지 손상 소아에서, ibuprofen 단독 대비 opioid(hydromorphone) 또는 비opioid(acetaminophen)를 ibuprofen에 추가하면 60분 시점 통증 점수가 감소하는가?

pico.population: [Canada] Children aged 6 to 17 years presenting to 6 university-affiliated, tertiary care Canadian pediatric emergency departments with a nonoperative acute limb injury (<24 hours) and a verbal numerical rating scale (vNRS) pain score of 5 or more out of 10, enrolled from April 2019 to March 2023; 8098 screened, 699 randomized, 653 included in efficacy analyses; mean (SD) age 11.5 (3.5) years, 47.4% female, mean (SD) vNRS at recruitment 6.4 (1.8).
pico.intervention: A single oral dose of ibuprofen plus hydromorphone (opioid trial) or ibuprofen plus acetaminophen (both trials); ibuprofen dosed at 10 mg/kg (maximum 600 mg), acetaminophen 15 mg/kg (maximum 1000 mg), and hydromorphone 0.05 mg/kg (maximum 5 mg).
pico.comparison: A single oral dose of ibuprofen alone (10 mg/kg, maximum 600 mg), placebo-controlled and double-masked.
pico.outcome: Primary efficacy outcome was self-reported vNRS pain score at 60 minutes post medication (range 0–10; MCID 1.5). In pooled analyses, mean (SD) vNRS at 60 minutes was 4.8 (2.6) with ibuprofen plus hydromorphone, 4.6 (2.4) with ibuprofen plus acetaminophen, and 4.6 (2.3) with ibuprofen alone (P = .78).

pico_ko.population: [캐나다] 6개 대학 연계 3차 캐나다 소아 응급실에 비수술적 급성 사지 손상(<24시간)과 verbal numerical rating scale(vNRS) 통증 점수 10점 만점 중 5점 이상으로 내원한 6~17세 소아, 2019년 4월~2023년 3월 등록; 8098명 선별, 699명 무작위 배정, 653명 유효성 분석 포함; 평균(SD) 연령 11.5(3.5)세, 47.4% 여아, 등록 시 평균(SD) vNRS 6.4(1.8).
pico_ko.intervention: ibuprofen에 hydromorphone 추가(opioid 시험) 또는 ibuprofen에 acetaminophen 추가(두 시험 모두)를 경구 단회 투여; ibuprofen 10 mg/kg(최대 600 mg), acetaminophen 15 mg/kg(최대 1000 mg), hydromorphone 0.05 mg/kg(최대 5 mg).
pico_ko.comparison: ibuprofen 단독 경구 단회 투여(10 mg/kg, 최대 600 mg), placebo 대조 및 double-masked.
pico_ko.outcome: 일차 유효성 결과는 투약 60분 후 자가 보고 vNRS 통증 점수(범위 0–10; MCID 1.5). 통합 분석에서 60분 시점 평균(SD) vNRS는 ibuprofen+hydromorphone 4.8(2.6), ibuprofen+acetaminophen 4.6(2.4), ibuprofen 단독 4.6(2.3) (P = .78).

secondaryOutcomes: Achievement of mild pain (vNRS <3) at 60 minutes: hydromorphone 23.4%, acetaminophen 19.9%, ibuprofen alone 19.3% (P = .95).
Pain reduction of ≥2 points at 60 minutes: 44.9% (hydromorphone), 47.0% (acetaminophen), 48.7% (ibuprofen alone).

Rescue analgesia required: 0 across all groups; any adverse event related to study drug occurred in 28.2% with ibuprofen plus hydromorphone vs 6.1% with ibuprofen plus acetaminophen and 5.8% with ibuprofen alone, with no serious adverse events.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 60분 시점 경증 통증(vNRS <3) 달성: hydromorphone 23.4%, acetaminophen 19.9%, ibuprofen 단독 19.3% (P = .95).
60분 시점 ≥2점 통증 감소: 44.9%(hydromorphone), 47.0%(acetaminophen), 48.7%(ibuprofen 단독).
구제 진통제 필요: 전 군에서 0명; 연구약 관련 이상반응은 ibuprofen+hydromorphone 28.2% vs ibuprofen+acetaminophen 6.1%, ibuprofen 단독 5.8%로 발생, 중대한 이상반응은 없었음.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: p-value: 관찰된 군 간 차이가 우연만으로 나타날 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 본다. 예: 60분 vNRS 비교 P = .78 → 세 군 간 통증 점수 차이가 우연 범위 안이라 유의한 차이가 없음.
표준편차(standard deviation): 값들이 평균 주변에 얼마나 퍼져 있는지를 나타낸다. 예: ibuprofen 단독군 vNRS 4.6 (SD 2.3) → 평균 4.6점 주변으로 대략 ±2.3점 정도 흩어져 있음.
최소 임상적 중요 차이(minimal clinically important difference): 환자가 의미 있다고 느끼는 최소한의 점수 변화. 예: vNRS MCID 1.5 → 군 간 통증 점수 차이가 1.5점 미만이면 임상적으로 의미 있는 차이로 보기 어려움.
구두 숫자 통증 척도(verbal numerical rating scale): 통증을 0(없음)~10(최악)으로 말로 평가하는 도구. 예: 등록 시 평균 vNRS 6.4 → 중등도~중증 통증 수준.

practiceChange: For children with acute nonoperative musculoskeletal limb injury and moderate-to-severe pain, use oral ibuprofen 10 mg/kg (max 600 mg) monotherapy as first-line; adding acetaminophen or hydromorphone did not produce a clinically meaningful improvement in 60-minute pain (all differences below the 1.5-point MCID; P = .78).

Avoid routinely adding oral hydromorphone to ibuprofen for this indication: it conferred no analgesic benefit while roughly quadrupling drug-related adverse events (28.2% vs ~6%), an unfavorable risk-benefit balance.

Do not reflexively add acetaminophen to ibuprofen expecting additive analgesia in this specific ED setting/timeframe; combination did not outperform ibuprofen alone at 60 minutes, so reserve escalation for clinical reassessment rather than automatic dual therapy.
practiceChange_ko: 급성 비수술적 근골격계 사지 손상과 중등도~중증 통증이 있는 소아에서는 경구 ibuprofen 10 mg/kg(최대 600 mg) 단독을 일차로 사용한다; acetaminophen이나 hydromorphone 추가는 60분 통증에서 임상적으로 의미 있는 개선을 주지 못했다(모든 차이가 MCID 1.5점 미만; P = .78).
이 적응증에서 ibuprofen에 경구 hydromorphone을 일상적으로 추가하지 않는다: 진통 이득은 없으면서 약물 관련 이상반응이 약 4배(28.2% vs 약 6%) 증가해 위험-이득 균형이 불리하다.
이 응급실 상황·시점에서 additive 진통을 기대하고 ibuprofen에 acetaminophen을 반사적으로 추가하지 않는다; 병용이 60분 시점에서 단독을 능가하지 못했으므로, 자동 병용보다는 임상적 재평가 후 단계적 상향을 고려한다.
keyFindings: In pooled analyses, mean (SD) vNRS at 60 minutes was 4.8 (2.6) for ibuprofen plus hydromorphone, 4.6 (2.4) for ibuprofen plus acetaminophen, and 4.6 (2.3) for ibuprofen alone (P = .78) — no significant or clinically meaningful difference (MCID 1.5).

Any drug-related adverse event occurred in 28.2% with ibuprofen plus hydromorphone vs 6.1% with ibuprofen plus acetaminophen and 5.8% with ibuprofen alone — a roughly 4-fold increase with hydromorphone; no serious adverse events occurred.

Across two trials, 8098 children were screened and 699 randomized (opioid trial n=249: 110/70/69; nonopioid trial n=450: 225/225), with 653 included in efficacy analyses; mean age 11.5 years and mean recruitment vNRS 6.4.
keyFindings_ko: 통합 분석에서 60분 시점 평균(SD) vNRS는 ibuprofen+hydromorphone 4.8(2.6), ibuprofen+acetaminophen 4.6(2.4), ibuprofen 단독 4.6(2.3) (P = .78) — 유의하거나 임상적으로 의미 있는 차이 없음(MCID 1.5).
약물 관련 이상반응은 ibuprofen+hydromorphone 28.2% vs ibuprofen+acetaminophen 6.1%, ibuprofen 단독 5.8%로 hydromorphone에서 약 4배 증가; 중대한 이상반응은 없었음.
두 시험에서 8098명이 선별되고 699명이 무작위 배정(opioid 시험 n=249: 110/70/69; nonopioid 시험 n=450: 225/225), 653명이 유효성 분석에 포함; 평균 연령 11.5세, 등록 시 평균 vNRS 6.4.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: For children aged 6–17 with acute nonoperative musculoskeletal limb injury, ibuprofen monotherapy (10 mg/kg, max 600 mg) is sufficient first-line analgesia — adding acetaminophen or hydromorphone did not meaningfully lower pain at 60 minutes (all below the 1.5-point MCID; P = .78). Hydromorphone added no benefit but quadrupled adverse events (28.2% vs ~6%), so it should not be routinely combined with ibuprofen for this indication. Reserve therapy escalation for clinical reassessment rather than automatic combination dosing.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 6~17세 급성 비수술적 근골격계 사지 손상 소아에서는 ibuprofen 단독(10 mg/kg, 최대 600 mg)이 충분한 일차 진통이다 — acetaminophen이나 hydromorphone 추가는 60분 통증을 의미 있게 낮추지 못했다(모두 MCID 1.5점 미만; P = .78). hydromorphone은 이득 없이 이상반응을 4배(28.2% vs 약 6%) 늘렸으므로 이 적응증에서 ibuprofen과 일상적으로 병용해서는 안 된다. 자동 병용보다 임상적 재평가 후 치료 상향을 고려한다.
arm2.limitations: Single oral dose with a single 60-minute primary endpoint, so longer-duration or repeated-dose analgesia and time-to-effect beyond 60 minutes were not assessed; results apply to acute (<24 hour), nonoperative limb injuries in Canadian tertiary pediatric EDs and may not generalize to operative, non-limb, or other settings. The opioid trial arms were relatively small (110/70/69), limiting power for less common outcomes, and outcomes rely on self-reported vNRS.
arm2.limitations_ko: 60분 단일 시점을 일차 종료점으로 한 경구 단회 투여이므로, 더 긴 시간 또는 반복 투여의 진통 효과와 60분 이후의 효과 발현 시점은 평가되지 않았다; 결과는 캐나다 3차 소아 응급실의 급성(<24시간) 비수술적 사지 손상에 해당하며 수술적·비사지·다른 세팅에는 일반화되지 않을 수 있다. opioid 시험군 규모가 상대적으로 작아(110/70/69) 드문 결과에 대한 검정력이 제한되고, 결과는 자가 보고 vNRS에 의존한다.

paper.title: Acetaminophen (Paracetamol) or Opioid Analgesia Added to Ibuprofen for Children's Musculoskeletal Injury: Two Randomized Clinical Trials.
paper.abstract:
IMPORTANCE: Ibuprofen is first-line therapy for musculoskeletal pain. However, two-thirds of children experience inadequate pain relief with ibuprofen monotherapy, and the efficacy of additive medications for moderate to severe musculoskeletal pain is unclear.
OBJECTIVE: To determine whether treatment with an opioid (hydromorphone) plus ibuprofen or nonopioid (acetaminophen [paracetamol]) plus ibuprofen decreased pain scores compared with ibuprofen alone.
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: Two randomized, double-masked, placebo-controlled trials were conducted from April 2019 to March 2023 in 6 university-affiliated, tertiary care Canadian pediatric emergency departments. Children aged 6 to 17 years presenting with a nonoperative acute limb injury (<24 hours) and a verbal numerical rating scale (vNRS) pain score of 5 or more out of 10 were enrolled. Date of final follow-up was March 22, 2023.
INTERVENTIONS: The opioid trial randomized participants to a single oral dose of ibuprofen plus hydromorphone, ibuprofen plus acetaminophen, or ibuprofen alone. The nonopioid trial randomized participants to a single oral dose of ibuprofen plus acetaminophen or ibuprofen alone. In all groups, ibuprofen was dosed at 10 mg/kg (maximum, 600 mg). The acetaminophen dose was 15 mg/kg (maximum, 1000 mg), and the hydromorphone dose was 0.05 mg/kg (maximum, 5 mg).
MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary efficacy outcome was self-reported vNRS pain score at 60 minutes post medication administration (score range, 0 [no pain] to 10 [worst pain]; minimal clinically important difference, 1.5). The primary safety end point was the proportion of children with any adverse event related to study drug administration.
RESULTS: A total of 8098 children were screened for eligibility; 699 were randomized and 653 were included in the efficacy analyses. The opioid trial included 249 children: 110 randomized to ibuprofen plus hydromorphone, 70 to ibuprofen plus acetaminophen, and 69 to ibuprofen alone. The nonopioid trial included 450 children: 225 randomized to a single oral dose of ibuprofen plus acetaminophen and 225 randomized to ibuprofen alone. The mean (SD) age of children in the 2 trials was 11.5 (3.5) years and 47.4% were female. The mean (SD) vNRS score at recruitment was 6.4 (1.8). In pooled analyses, mean (SD) vNRS scores 60 minutes after drug administration were 4.8 (2.6) in the ibuprofen plus hydromorphone group, 4.6 (2.4) in the ibuprofen plus acetaminophen group, and 4.6 (2.3) in the ibuprofen alone group (P = .78). Any adverse event occurred at higher rates in the ibuprofen plus hydromorphone group (28.2%) compared with the ibuprofen plus acetaminophen (6.1%) or ibuprofen alone groups (5.8%). No serious adverse events occurred.
CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: For children with acute nonoperative musculoskeletal injury, pain scores at 60 minutes after drug administration did not improve with ibuprofen plus acetaminophen or ibuprofen plus hydromorphone compared with ibuprofen alone. Adverse events were 4-fold more frequent with hydromorphone.
TRIAL REGISTRATION: Clinicaltrials.gov Identifier: NCT03767933.

arm1.title_ko: 패혈증 및 심근 손상 환자의 관상동맥 미세혈관 기능: 침습적 관상동맥 생리 연구
arm1.clinicalQuestion: In adults with sepsis and myocardial injury (hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L), what is the prevalence and phenotype of coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMD) on invasive coronary physiology testing, and is it associated with the magnitude of troponin release?
arm1.clinicalQuestion_ko: 패혈증과 심근 손상(hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L)이 있는 성인에서 침습적 관상동맥 생리 검사로 확인되는 coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMD)의 유병률과 표현형은 어떠하며, 이것이 troponin 상승 정도와 연관되는가?

pico.population: [Sweden] Consecutive adults with sepsis (Sepsis-3 criteria) and myocardial injury (hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L) prospectively enrolled between June 2019 and December 2024 (registry inclusion age 40–85 years); 55 patients underwent coronary angiography and 49 completed invasive coronary microvascular assessment.
pico.intervention: Coronary angiography plus invasive thermodilution-based assessment of coronary microvascular function and transthoracic echocardiography after clinical stabilisation; CMD defined as an index of microcirculatory resistance (IMR) > 25 and/or microvascular resistance reserve (MRR) ≤ 3.
pico.comparison: Age-, sex-, and CAD-matched patients with chronic coronary syndrome (CCS), compared using mixed-effects models.
pico.outcome: No evidence of associations between hs-cTnT and coronary microvascular indices on restricted cubic spline analyses: IMR (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687) or MRR (overall P = 0.987; non-linearity P = 0.954).

pico_ko.population: [스웨덴] Sepsis-3 기준을 만족하는 패혈증과 심근 손상(hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L)을 동반한 연속 성인 환자로 2019년 6월부터 2024년 12월까지 전향적으로 등록(등록 기준 연령 40–85세); 55명이 coronary angiography를 받았고 49명이 침습적 관상동맥 미세혈관 평가를 완료함.
pico_ko.intervention: 임상적 안정화 후 coronary angiography와 thermodilution 기반 침습적 관상동맥 미세혈관 기능 평가 및 transthoracic echocardiography 시행; CMD는 index of microcirculatory resistance (IMR) > 25 및/또는 microvascular resistance reserve (MRR) ≤ 3으로 정의함.
pico_ko.comparison: 연령·성별·CAD로 매칭된 chronic coronary syndrome (CCS) 환자를 mixed-effects models로 비교함.
pico_ko.outcome: Restricted cubic spline 분석에서 hs-cTnT와 관상동맥 미세혈관 지표 간 연관성의 증거 없음: IMR (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687), MRR (overall P = 0.987; non-linearity P = 0.954).

secondaryOutcomes: CMD was present in 30/49 (61%); among these 8/49 (16%) had elevated IMR only, 9/49 (18%) had functional CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR ≤ 25), and 13/49 (27%) had structural CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR > 25).
Previously unrecognised obstructive CAD was identified in 12/55 (22%).

Sepsis patients showed reduced coronary microvascular vasodilatory capacity vs matched CCS controls (MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs. 4.0 [2.7–6.2]); IMR was similar between groups. CMD was associated with higher prevalence of ventriculo-arterial uncoupling, right ventricular systolic dysfunction, and impaired right ventricular–pulmonary arterial coupling.
secondaryOutcomes_ko: CMD는 30/49 (61%)에서 존재; 이 중 8/49 (16%)는 IMR 상승만, 9/49 (18%)는 functional CMD (MRR ≤ 3 및 IMR ≤ 25), 13/49 (27%)는 structural CMD (MRR ≤ 3 및 IMR > 25)였음.
이전에 인지되지 않았던 obstructive CAD가 12/55 (22%)에서 확인됨.
패혈증 환자는 매칭된 CCS 대조군보다 관상동맥 미세혈관 확장 능력이 감소함 (MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs. 4.0 [2.7–6.2]); IMR은 두 군 간 유사함. CMD는 ventriculo-arterial uncoupling, 우심실 수축 기능 장애, 우심실–폐동맥 coupling 저하의 높은 유병률과 연관됨.

statGlossary.explanation_ko: 관찰된 결과가 우연히 나타날 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의하다고 봄. 예: hs-cTnT와 IMR 간 overall P = 0.899 → 0.05보다 훨씬 커서 둘 사이에 유의한 연관이 없음을 의미.
사분위수 범위로, 자료를 크기순으로 늘어놓았을 때 가운데 50%가 분포하는 구간(25~75백분위)임. 예: 패혈증군 MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] → 환자 절반의 MRR이 2.4에서 4.5 사이에 위치함.
index of microcirculatory resistance로, 관상동맥 미세혈관 저항을 침습적으로 측정한 값이며 높을수록 미세혈관 기능이 나쁨. 예: 이 연구에서 IMR > 25를 CMD 기준의 하나로 사용함.
microvascular resistance reserve로, 안정기 대비 최대 충혈 시 미세혈관 확장 능력을 반영하며 낮을수록 예비능이 나쁨. 예: 이 연구에서 MRR ≤ 3을 CMD 기준의 하나로 사용했고 패혈증군은 3.2로 대조군 4.0보다 낮았음.
두 변수 간 관계를 직선으로만 보지 않고 비선형 곡선까지 유연하게 검정하는 회귀 방법임. 예: hs-cTnT와 IMR 관계에서 non-linearity P = 0.687 → 곡선형(비선형) 연관의 증거도 없음.

practiceChange: In sepsis with myocardial injury, do not assume troponin elevation reflects the severity of coronary microvascular dysfunction — hs-cTnT was NOT associated with IMR or MRR, so troponin should not be used as a surrogate for CMD burden.

Given that 22% of these patients had previously unrecognised obstructive CAD, maintain a low threshold to consider/evaluate underlying epicardial coronary disease in sepsis patients with myocardial injury rather than attributing all troponin rise to demand or 'sepsis myocarditis'.

This is a small, mechanistic single-centre study with no clinical outcome or treatment arm; it should NOT yet prompt routine invasive coronary physiology testing in septic patients — reserve angiography for standard clinical indications.
practiceChange_ko: 심근 손상을 동반한 패혈증에서 troponin 상승이 coronary microvascular dysfunction의 중증도를 반영한다고 가정하지 말 것 — hs-cTnT는 IMR·MRR과 연관되지 않았으므로 troponin을 CMD 부담의 대리지표로 사용해서는 안 됨.
이 환자의 22%에서 이전에 인지되지 않았던 obstructive CAD가 확인되었으므로, 패혈증 심근 손상을 모두 수요 불균형이나 'sepsis 심근염'으로 치부하지 말고 기저 심외막 관상동맥 질환 가능성을 낮은 문턱으로 평가할 것.
이 연구는 소규모 단일기관 기전 연구로 임상 결과나 치료 arm이 없으므로, 패혈증 환자에서 침습적 관상동맥 생리 검사의 일상적 시행을 유도해서는 안 되며 angiography는 표준 임상 적응증에 한정할 것.
keyFindings: CMD was common (30/49, 61%) and heterogeneous, with distinct phenotypes: elevated IMR only 8/49 (16%), functional CMD 9/49 (18%), and structural CMD 13/49 (27%).
Coronary microvascular indices were NOT associated with troponin release — hs-cTnT vs IMR (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687) and vs MRR (overall P = 0.987; non-linearity P = 0.954).

Previously unrecognised obstructive CAD was found in 12/55 (22%); sepsis patients had reduced vasodilatory capacity vs matched CCS controls (MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs. 4.0 [2.7–6.2]) while IMR was similar.
keyFindings_ko: CMD는 흔했고(30/49, 61%) 이질적이었으며 뚜렷한 표현형을 보임: IMR 상승만 8/49 (16%), functional CMD 9/49 (18%), structural CMD 13/49 (27%).
관상동맥 미세혈관 지표는 troponin 상승과 연관되지 않음 — hs-cTnT vs IMR (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687), vs MRR (overall P = 0.987; non-linearity P = 0.954).
이전에 인지되지 않았던 obstructive CAD가 12/55 (22%)에서 확인됨; 패혈증 환자는 매칭 CCS 대조군보다 확장 능력이 감소(MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4–4.5] vs. 4.0 [2.7–6.2])했으나 IMR은 유사함.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway: In sepsis-related myocardial injury, coronary microvascular dysfunction is present in about 61% of patients and is phenotypically heterogeneous, but the degree of troponin elevation does not track with microvascular resistance indices. Clinicians should not equate high troponin with worse CMD, and — because nearly one in five patients harboured unrecognised obstructive CAD — should keep genuine coronary disease on the differential for septic patients with myocardial injury.
arm1.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 패혈증 관련 심근 손상에서 coronary microvascular dysfunction은 약 61%의 환자에서 존재하고 표현형이 이질적이지만, troponin 상승 정도는 미세혈관 저항 지표와 일치하지 않음. 임상의는 높은 troponin을 더 심한 CMD와 동일시해서는 안 되며, 약 5명 중 1명이 인지되지 않은 obstructive CAD를 가졌으므로 심근 손상을 동반한 패혈증 환자에서 실제 관상동맥 질환을 감별진단에 두어야 함.
arm1.limitations: Small single-centre prospective observational study (55 angiography, 49 with complete invasive assessment) with no clinical outcome endpoints and no interventional arm; measurements were made only after clinical stabilisation (not during acute shock), so acute-phase microvascular changes may be missed. CMD definitions rely on specific IMR/MRR thresholds, comparisons used non-randomised matched CCS controls, and the design permits association only — no causal inference regarding troponin release or mortality.
arm1.limitations_ko: 임상 결과 지표나 중재 arm이 없는 소규모 단일기관 전향적 관찰 연구(angiography 55명, 완전 침습 평가 49명); 측정이 급성 shock 시기가 아니라 임상적 안정화 이후에만 이루어져 급성기 미세혈관 변화를 놓쳤을 수 있음. CMD 정의는 특정 IMR/MRR 문턱값에 의존하고 비교는 비무작위 매칭 CCS 대조군을 사용했으며, 설계상 연관성만 볼 수 있어 troponin 상승이나 사망률에 대한 인과 추론은 불가함.

paper.title: Coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury: an invasive coronary physiology study.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: Myocardial injury is common in sepsis and associated with increased mortality, but its underlying mechanisms remain incompletely understood. Coronary microvascular dysfunction (CMD) has been proposed as a contributor, although in vivo evidence is limited. We characterised coronary microvascular function in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury and its relationship with cardiac troponin release.
METHODS: Consecutive adults with sepsis (Sepsis-3 criteria) and myocardial injury (hs-cTnT ≥ 15 ng/L) were prospectively enrolled between June 2019 and December 2024. Patients underwent coronary angiography, invasive thermodilution-based assessment of coronary microvascular function, and transthoracic echocardiography after clinical stabilisation. CMD was defined as an index of microcirculatory resistance (IMR) > 25 and/or microvascular resistance reserve (MRR) ≤ 3. Associations between hs-cTnT concentrations and coronary microvascular indices, obstructive coronary artery disease (CAD), and echocardiographic variables were assessed using regression analyses. Coronary microvascular indices were compared with those of age-, sex-, and CAD-matched patients with chronic coronary syndrome (CCS) using mixed-effects models.
RESULTS: Fifty-five patients underwent coronary angiography and 49 completed invasive coronary microvascular assessment. Obstructive CAD was identified in 12/55 (22%). CMD was present in 30/49 (61%). Among these, 8/49 (16%) had elevated IMR only, 9/49 (18%) had functional CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR ≤ 25), and 13/49 (27%) had structural CMD (MRR ≤ 3 and IMR > 25). Restricted cubic spline analyses demonstrated no evidence of associations between hs-cTnT and IMR (overall P = 0.899; non-linearity P = 0.687) or MRR (overall P = 0.987; non-linearity P = 0.954). CMD was associated with a higher prevalence of ventriculo-arterial uncoupling, right ventricular systolic dysfunction, and impaired right ventricular-pulmonary arterial coupling. Patients with sepsis demonstrated reduced coronary microvascular vasodilatory capacity compared with matched CCS controls (MRR 3.2 [IQR 2.4-4.5] vs. 4.0 [2.7-6.2]). IMR was similar between groups.
CONCLUSIONS: CMD was common and heterogeneous and exhibited distinct phenotypes in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury. Measures of coronary microvascular function were not associated with troponin release. Previously unrecognised obstructive CAD was identified in 22% of patients, supporting consideration of underlying CAD in patients with sepsis and myocardial injury.
TRIAL REGISTRATION: ClinicalTrials.gov identifier NCT06294730.

arm2.title_ko: 발병 24시간 이내 basilar artery occlusion에 대한 tenecteplase 대 표준 약물치료 (TRACE-5): 다기관, 전향적, 무작위배정, 공개라벨, 눈가림 평가변수, 우월성, 3상 임상시험
arm2.clinicalQuestion: In adults with acute ischaemic stroke due to basilar artery occlusion presenting within 24 h of onset or last-known-well, does a single intravenous bolus of tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg, max 25 mg) improve 90-day functional outcome compared with standard medical treatment, with or without endovascular thrombectomy?
arm2.clinicalQuestion_ko: 발병 또는 last-known-well 후 24시간 이내에 내원한 basilar artery occlusion에 의한 급성 허혈성 뇌졸중 성인 환자에서, tenecteplase 단회 정맥 볼루스(0.25 mg/kg, 최대 25 mg)가 endovascular thrombectomy 시행 여부와 무관하게 표준 약물치료 대비 90일 기능적 예후를 향상시키는가?

pico.population: [China] Patients aged 18 years or older with stroke due to basilar artery occlusion who were eligible for intravenous thrombolytics within 24 h of stroke onset or the time they were last known to be well and had a pre-stroke modified Rankin scale (mRS) score of 3 or less, enrolled at 66 stroke centres in China; 452 patients (mean age 66.4 years [SD 11.2], 321 [71%] males, 131 [29%] females), of whom 222 (49%) subsequently underwent thrombectomy.
pico.intervention: A single intravenous bolus of tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum 25 mg) within 24 h after symptom onset, with or without endovascular thrombectomy (n=221).
pico.comparison: Standard medical treatment (which could include intravenous alteplase at 0.9 mg/kg, maximum 90 mg, within 4.5 h of symptom onset; anticoagulation; or antiplatelets), with or without endovascular thrombectomy (n=231); alteplase was used in 80 (35%) of these patients.
pico.outcome: Primary outcome — a score of 0-1 on the mRS or return to the baseline mRS score (if the baseline pre-stroke mRS score was 2-3) at 90 days: 83 (38%) patients in the tenecteplase group vs 66 (29%) in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 1.50 [95% CI 1.09-2.08], p=0.014).

pico_ko.population: [중국] basilar artery occlusion에 의한 뇌졸중 환자 중 발병 또는 last-known-well 후 24시간 이내에 정맥 혈전용해제 투여가 가능하고 뇌졸중 이전 modified Rankin scale (mRS) 점수가 3점 이하인 18세 이상 성인, 중국 66개 뇌졸중센터에서 등록; 총 452명(평균 연령 66.4세 [SD 11.2], 남성 321명 [71%], 여성 131명 [29%]), 이 중 222명(49%)이 이후 thrombectomy를 받음.
pico_ko.intervention: 발병 24시간 이내 tenecteplase 단회 정맥 볼루스(0.25 mg/kg; 최대 25 mg) 투여, endovascular thrombectomy 시행 여부 무관 (n=221).
pico_ko.comparison: 표준 약물치료(발병 4.5시간 이내 정맥 alteplase 0.9 mg/kg, 최대 90 mg, 항응고 또는 항혈소판제 포함 가능), endovascular thrombectomy 시행 여부 무관 (n=231); 이 중 80명 [35%]에서 alteplase 사용됨.
pico_ko.outcome: 1차 평가변수 — 90일째 mRS 0-1점 또는 기저 mRS 점수로의 복귀(기저 뇌졸중 이전 mRS가 2-3점인 경우): tenecteplase군 83명(38%) 대 표준 약물치료군 66명(29%) (adjusted relative rate 1.50 [95% CI 1.09-2.08], p=0.014).

secondaryOutcomes: Symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage within 36 h: 4 (2%) in the tenecteplase group vs 7 (3%) in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 0.58 [95% CI 0.17-1.99]).
All-cause mortality at 90 days: 65 (29%) in the tenecteplase group vs 71 (31%) in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.62-1.22]).
mRS score of 5-6 at 90 days: 82 (37%) in the tenecteplase group vs 89 (39%) in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.65-1.18]).
secondaryOutcomes_ko: 36시간 이내 symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage: tenecteplase군 4명(2%) 대 표준 약물치료군 7명(3%) (adjusted relative rate 0.58 [95% CI 0.17-1.99]).
90일 all-cause mortality: tenecteplase군 65명(29%) 대 표준 약물치료군 71명(31%) (adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.62-1.22]).
90일째 mRS 5-6점: tenecteplase군 82명(37%) 대 표준 약물치료군 89명(39%) (adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.65-1.18]).

statGlossary.explanation_ko: modified Rankin Scale: 뇌졸중 후 장애 정도를 0(증상 없음)~6(사망)으로 매기는 척도로 점수가 높을수록 장애가 심함. 예: mRS 0-1 → 장애가 없거나 거의 없는 우수한 기능적 예후를 의미.
보정 상대율: 기저 변수를 보정한 후 대조군 대비 사건 발생 비율로, 1보다 크면 해당 결과가 더 흔함을 의미. 예: 1차 예후 1.50 → tenecteplase군에서 좋은 기능적 예후가 표준치료군보다 약 50% 더 흔함.
95% 신뢰구간: 참값이 존재할 것으로 추정되는 범위로, 1을 포함하지 않으면 통계적으로 유의함. 예: 1차 예후 1.09-2.08 → 1을 넘지 않으므로 유의한 이득, 안전성 지표 0.17-1.99 → 1을 포함하므로 유의차 없음.
p값: 관찰된 차이가 우연일 확률로, 보통 0.05 미만이면 통계적으로 유의함. 예: p=0.014 → 1차 예후의 차이가 우연일 가능성이 낮아 유의함.
표준편차(standard deviation): 평균 주변으로 값이 퍼진 정도를 나타냄. 예: 평균 연령 66.4세 (SD 11.2) → 연령이 대략 66세를 중심으로 ±11세 범위에 주로 분포.

practiceChange: In BAO patients presenting within 24 h who are not (or not yet) receiving endovascular thrombectomy, IV tenecteplase 0.25 mg/kg (max 25 mg) is a reasonable option to improve 90-day functional outcome, extending the thrombolysis window well beyond the traditional 4.5 h in this specific posterior-circulation population.

Safety data are reassuring: symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage (2% vs 3%) and 90-day mortality (29% vs 31%) were not increased versus standard care, supporting use even in this late-window cohort — but note ~49% of patients also underwent thrombectomy, so tenecteplase should be integrated with, not replace, EVT pathways where indicated.

Do not extrapolate uncritically to non-Chinese/Western populations or to anterior-circulation stroke; the benefit shown here is specific to BAO within 24 h in a Chinese cohort, and local imaging-based selection and EVT capability remain essential.
practiceChange_ko: 24시간 이내 내원한 BAO 환자 중 endovascular thrombectomy를 받지 않는(또는 아직 받지 않은) 경우, IV tenecteplase 0.25 mg/kg(최대 25 mg)는 90일 기능적 예후 향상을 위한 합리적 선택지이며, 이 후방순환 특정 집단에서 전통적 4.5시간 혈전용해 시간창을 크게 확장한다.

안전성 데이터는 안심할 만하다: symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage(2% 대 3%)와 90일 mortality(29% 대 31%)가 표준치료 대비 증가하지 않아 이 late-window 코호트에서도 사용을 뒷받침한다 — 단 환자의 약 49%가 thrombectomy도 받았으므로 tenecteplase는 적응이 되는 경우 EVT 경로를 대체하지 않고 통합해야 한다.
비중국/서구 인구집단이나 anterior-circulation 뇌졸중으로 무비판적으로 확대 적용하지 말 것; 이 이득은 중국 코호트의 24시간 이내 BAO에 특화된 결과이며, 국소 영상 기반 선별과 EVT 역량이 여전히 필수적이다.
keyFindings: IV tenecteplase within 24 h significantly improved the primary functional outcome (mRS 0-1 or return to baseline at 90 days): 83/221 (38%) vs 66/231 (29%) with standard medical treatment (adjusted relative rate 1.50 [95% CI 1.09-2.08], p=0.014).
Symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage within 36 h was low and not increased: 4 (2%) with tenecteplase vs 7 (3%) with standard care (adjusted relative rate 0.58 [95% CI 0.17-1.99]).
90-day all-cause mortality was similar between groups (65 [29%] vs 71 [31%]; adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.62-1.22]), as was severe disability/death (mRS 5-6: 37% vs 39%; 0.87 [0.65-1.18]).
keyFindings_ko: 24시간 이내 IV tenecteplase는 1차 기능적 예후(90일째 mRS 0-1 또는 기저 복귀)를 유의하게 향상시켰다: 83/221명(38%) 대 표준 약물치료 66/231명(29%) (adjusted relative rate 1.50 [95% CI 1.09-2.08], p=0.014).
36시간 이내 symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage는 낮았고 증가하지 않았다: tenecteplase 4명(2%) 대 표준치료 7명(3%) (adjusted relative rate 0.58 [95% CI 0.17-1.99]).
90일 all-cause mortality는 두 군에서 유사했고(65명 [29%] 대 71명 [31%]; adjusted relative rate 0.87 [95% CI 0.62-1.22]), 중증 장애/사망(mRS 5-6: 37% 대 39%; 0.87 [0.65-1.18])도 유사했다.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway: In Chinese patients with basilar artery occlusion presenting within 24 h, IV tenecteplase 0.25 mg/kg improved 90-day functional outcome (38% vs 29% mRS 0-1/return to baseline; adjusted relative rate 1.50, p=0.014) without increasing symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage or mortality. For EM/CCM clinicians, this supports considering tenecteplase in the extended (up to 24 h) window for BAO, alongside — not instead of — endovascular thrombectomy where indicated. Applicability beyond Chinese cohorts and outside dedicated stroke-centre workflows remains uncertain.
arm2.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 24시간 이내 내원한 중국의 basilar artery occlusion 환자에서 IV tenecteplase 0.25 mg/kg는 symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage나 mortality 증가 없이 90일 기능적 예후를 향상시켰다(mRS 0-1/기저 복귀 38% 대 29%; adjusted relative rate 1.50, p=0.014). EM/CCM 임상의에게 이는 BAO의 확장된(최대 24시간) 시간창에서 tenecteplase 고려를 뒷받침하며, 적응이 되는 경우 endovascular thrombectomy를 대체하지 않고 병행해야 한다. 중국 외 코호트나 전용 뇌졸중센터 워크플로 밖에서의 적용 가능성은 여전히 불확실하다.
arm2.limitations: Open-label design (only endpoints were blinded) may introduce performance bias; conducted entirely in Chinese patients at 66 stroke centres, limiting generalisability to other populations and health systems. The 'standard medical treatment' comparator was heterogeneous (alteplase in only 35%, plus anticoagulation/antiplatelets), and 49% of all patients underwent thrombectomy, making it difficult to isolate the effect of tenecteplase alone. The commercial funding from a pharmaceutical manufacturer of the study drug is a potential source of bias, and detailed baseline comparability and imaging-selection criteria were not provided in the abstract.
arm2.limitations_ko: 공개라벨(open-label) 설계(평가변수만 눈가림)로 수행 편향(performance bias) 가능성이 있고, 전적으로 중국 66개 뇌졸중센터 환자 대상으로 수행되어 다른 인구집단·의료체계로의 일반화가 제한된다. '표준 약물치료' 대조군이 이질적이었고(alteplase는 35%에서만 사용, 항응고/항혈소판제 포함), 전체 환자의 49%가 thrombectomy를 받아 tenecteplase 단독 효과를 분리하기 어렵다. 시험약 제조 제약사의 상업적 연구비 지원은 잠재적 편향 요인이며, 상세한 기저 비교가능성과 영상 선별 기준은 초록에 제시되지 않았다.

paper.title: Tenecteplase versus standard medical treatment for basilar artery occlusion within 24 h (TRACE-5): a multicentre, prospective, randomised, open-label, blinded-endpoint, superiority, phase 3 trial.
paper.abstract:
BACKGROUND: The efficacy and safety of intravenous thrombolysis with tenecteplase within 24 h after stroke onset due to basilar artery occlusion are not well studied. We aimed to assess whether intravenous tenecteplase administered within 24 h after symptom onset improved functional outcome compared with standard medical treatment in patients with basilar artery occlusion.
METHODS: TRACE-5 was a prospective, randomised, open-label, blinded-endpoint, superiority, phase 3 trial conducted at 66 stroke centres in China. We included patients aged 18 years or older with stroke due to basilar artery occlusion who were eligible for intravenous thrombolytics within 24 h of stroke onset or the time they were last known to be well and had a pre-stroke modified Rankin scale (mRS) score of 3 or less (scores range from 0 to 6, with higher scores indicating greater disability). Patients were randomly assigned to receive a single intravenous bolus of tenecteplase (0·25 mg/kg; maximum 25 mg) within 24 h after symptom onset or standard medical treatment (which could include intravenous alteplase at 0·9 mg/kg, maximum 90 mg, within 4·5 h of symptom onset; anticoagulation; or antiplatelets), with or without endovascular thrombectomy. The primary outcome was a score of 0-1 on the mRS or return to the baseline mRS score (if the baseline pre-stroke mRS score was 2-3) at 90 days. Safety outcomes were symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage and death. The primary outcome and safety outcomes were assessed in all randomly assigned participants included in their originally assigned groups. This trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT06196320.
FINDINGS: Between Jan 24, 2024, and June 20, 2025, 452 patients were enrolled (mean age 66·4 years [SD 11·2], 321 [71%] males, and 131 [29%] females), of whom 222 (49%) subsequently underwent thrombectomy; 221 were randomly assigned to receive tenecteplase and 231 to receive standard medical treatment. Alteplase was used in 80 (35%) of the patients in the standard medical treatment group. An mRS score of 0-1 or return to the baseline mRS score occurred in 83 (38%) patients in the tenecteplase group and 66 (29%) patients in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 1·50 [95% CI 1·09-2·08], p=0·014). Symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage within 36 h occurred in four (2%) patients in the tenecteplase group and seven (3%) patients in the standard medical treatment group (adjusted relative rate 0·58 [95% CI 0·17-1·99]). All-cause mortality at 90 days was similar between groups (65 [29%] patients in the tenecteplase group and 71 [31%] patients in the standard medical treatment group; adjusted relative rate 0·87 [95% CI 0·62-1·22]), as was the proportion of patients with an mRS score of 5-6 at 90 days (82 [37%] vs 89 [39%]; 0·87 [0·65-1·18]).
INTERPRETATION: In this trial involving Chinese patients with ischaemic stroke due to basilar artery occlusion, tenecteplase within 24 h after stroke onset improved functional outcome compared with standard medical treatment. The incidence of symptomatic intracranial haemorrhage and death was similar.
FUNDING: Noncommunicable Chronic Diseases-National Science and Technology Major Project, Beijing Municipal Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars, National Natural Science Foundation of China, and China Shijiazhuang Pharmaceutical Company Recomgen Pharmaceutical (Guangzhou).
